what_went_well: Thorough analysis of existing codebase: identified all controllers, templates, tests, and specs
Found the archived original change (2026-03-21-add-admin-agent-registry) with detailed task history
Cross-referenced the OpenSpec audit document confirming 30/38 completion status
Identified concrete gaps: missing E2E tests (install flow, config save, violations modal, iframe), i18n inconsistency in settings template, TBD spec Purpose, missing docs
All 4 spec delta requirements validated successfully with openspec validate --strict
Tasks are scoped to realistic, completable work items that close the feature
what_went_wrong: The original task description referenced 'add-admin-agent-registry' as an active change, but it was already archived — had to create a new change ID 'complete-admin-agent-registry'

The original 38-task count included many lifecycle/orchestration tasks (sections 9-11) that are aspirational and not part of the current MVP — scoped the new proposal to the practical remaining gaps instead
improvement_suggestions: The archived change's unchecked tasks (lifecycle state machine, provisioning orchestration, observability) should be tracked in a separate future proposal rather than blocking this completion
Consider archiving the stale 'refactor-agent-discovery' and 'add-agent-marketplace-and-deprovision' changes whose code is already implemented
The agent-registry spec Purpose should be updated as part of this change (included in tasks)
deviations_from_spec: Used change ID 'complete-admin-agent-registry' instead of 'add-admin-agent-registry' since the original was already archived

Scoped to 17 concrete tasks (8 groups) focused on test coverage, i18n, spec updates, and docs — rather than attempting to resurrect the full 38-task original scope which included unimplemented lifecycle orchestration features
